title: belis lanceolata
intro: Belis lanceolata, also known as sweet sultan or lance-leaved belamcanda, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Belis lanceolata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried roots, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal infusions.
